name: Kaeng Krachan Country Club & Resort
designer: Cherd Bunyaratavej (original 18 holes); Jack Nicklaus design team (9-hole Mountain Course, 2008)
notes: 27-hole facility: original 18-hole Lake and Valley Course (designed by Cherd Bunyaratavej, opened 1994) plus a 9-hole Jack Nicklaus Mountain Course added March 2008. Located in Kaeng Krachan District, Phetchaburi Province, approximately 51 km inland from Hua Hin on the edge of Kaeng Krachan National Park. Address: 19 Moo 2 Tayang-Kaengkrachan Rd, Kaeng Krachan, Phetchaburi 76130. Course managed/operated by Power Nine Group from 2023. Previous operator offered green fees around 1,200–1,500 THB all-in (caddie + shared cart included); current Power Nine pricing per their website: weekday shared cart 1,199 THB, weekday single cart 1,299 THB, weekend shared cart 1,399 THB, weekend single cart 1,499 THB — these appear to be all-inclusive packages. Green fee separated from caddie/cart could not be confirmed from public sources; caddie_fee_thb and cart_fee_thb shown separately as historical reference from prior operator (kolfers.com listed caddie 300 THB, cart 'not allowed on fairway'). Kolfers.com listed phone 081-867-6701 (older number). Some booking platforms show the course as closed for external bookings. Gets very little play especially in low season. Shoe rental 200 THB, umbrella rental 100 THB. Golf course GPS from elevation.maplogs.com cross-referenced with golfasian.com (12.901647, 99.682025) — coordinates differ slightly between sources; 12.883 / 99.756 from maplogs appears more precise for Wang Chan sub-district.
